h1: Bathroom Remodeling Services in Sarasota, FL
intro: Elevate your bathroom with Titan Homes Group's premium bathroom remodeling services in Sarasota, FL. From walk-in shower installations to complete spa-quality transformations, we handle every detail.
bodyContent:
Titan Homes Group offers comprehensive bathroom remodeling services to homeowners in Sarasota, FL. Our licensed team transforms outdated bathrooms into stunning, functional spaces that increase both your daily quality of life and your home's value.

Whether you're dreaming of a master bathroom with a freestanding soaking tub and rain shower, a sleek guest bathroom refresh, or an ADA-accessible renovation, our Sarasota bathroom remodeling team delivers with expert craftsmanship and attention to detail.

Our bathroom remodeling services in Sarasota include custom tile work (floor, wall, and accent), frameless glass shower enclosures, walk-in shower conversions, vanity and fixture upgrades, heated flooring, and all associated plumbing and electrical work.

Sarasota homeowners consistently rate Titan Homes Group 5 stars for professionalism, communication, and the quality of our finished work. We're proud to be a BBB Accredited, NKBA Certified contractor serving Sarasota and the broader Tampa Bay region.

faqs.question: How much does bathroom remodeling cost in Sarasota, FL?
faqs.answer: Bathroom remodeling in Sarasota typically starts around $8,000 for a basic update and ranges to $50,000+ for a complete luxury master bath renovation. The final cost depends on bathroom size, tile selection, fixture quality, and plumbing requirements.

faqs.question: How long does a bathroom remodel take in Sarasota?
faqs.answer: A standard bathroom remodel in Sarasota takes 2–4 weeks. Larger master bath renovations with custom tilework can take 4–6 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline after your free consultation.

faqs.question: Do you handle plumbing and electrical for Sarasota bathroom remodels?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team includes licensed plumbers and electricians who handle all rough-in and finish work. Everything is coordinated in-house for a seamless Sarasota bathroom remodeling experience.
